email.utils/getaddresses.name: getaddresses
email.utils/getaddresses.description: This method returns a list of 2-tuples of the form returned by parseaddr(). fieldvalues is a sequence of header field values as might be returned by Message.get_all. If strict is true, use a strict parser which rejects malformed inputs. Here’s a simple example that gets all the recipients of a message: from email.utils import getaddresses tos = msg.get_all('to', []) ccs = msg.get_all('cc', []) resent_tos = msg.get_all('resent-to', []) resent_ccs = msg.get_all('resent-cc', []) all_recipients =...
